title: Hash Map Complement Pattern
snippet: When a problem asks for two values adding to a target, scan once, look up the complement first, then insert the current value after the check.

title: Wrong Answer Boundary Checklist
snippet: For Wrong Answer, re-check duplicate values, zero-based indices, complement lookup order, and whether the current element is reused incorrectly.

title: Two Sum Problem Hint
snippet: This pattern usually needs O(n) lookup with a value-to-index map; brute-force nested loops are correct but slower and easier to get duplicate handling wrong.
